new_posts.title: Upcoming deprecation of GPT-4.1
new_posts.summary: We will deprecate the following model across all GitHub Copilot experiences (including Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions) on 6/1/2026: Model Deprecation date Sug

new_posts.title: Claude Sonnet 4 deprecated
new_posts.summary: We have deprecated the following model across all GitHub Copilot experiences (including Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions) on May 6, 2026. Model Deprecation date

new_posts.title: Enterprise Live Migrations is now in public preview
new_posts.summary: Enterprise Live Migrations (ELM) is now available in public preview. ELM gives enterprise administrators a new way to migrate repositories from GitHub Enterprise Server (GHES) to GitHub Enterprise

new_posts.title: Agent pull requests are everywhere. Here’s how to review them.
new_posts.summary:
A practical guide to reviewing agent-generated pull requests: what to look for, where issues hide, and how to catch technical debt before it ships.

The post

new_posts.title: Rubber Duck in GitHub Copilot CLI now supports more models
new_posts.summary:
Rubber Duck, the cross-family review agent in GitHub Copilot CLI, is now available using a Claude-powered critic agent when your session is using a GPT model. For sessions using Claude…

new_posts.summary: GitHub repository rulesets now support two frequently requested features: adding individual users as bypass actors and renaming branches covered by organization rulesets. Add individual users as by

new_posts.title: Enterprise-managed plugins in GitHub Copilot CLI are now in public preview
new_posts.summary: Enterprise administrators can now configure and distribute plugins to GitHub Copilot CLI users across their enterprise. Set baseline standards for your enterprise and make them available in every u

new_posts.title: Validating agentic behavior when “correct” isn’t deterministic
new_posts.summary:
How to build the “Trust Layer” for Github Copilot Coding Agents without brittle scripts or black-box judgements by using dominatory analysis.

The post

new_posts.title: GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code, April releases
new_posts.summary: VS Code moved to weekly stable releases. This changelog covers releases v1.116 through v1.119, the releases we shipped throughout April and early May 2026. Copilot can now search by meaning…<

new_posts.summary:
